title: Superior Service Medal
content:

The '''Superior Service Medal''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] medal for continuing excellence in the line of duty. It was a simple metal disc embossed with the [[Alliance Starbird|Rebel Alliance symbol]], suspended from a [[Color/Legends|red]] and blue ribbon.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-XX-XX -->''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''
